elasticmapreduce.cluster.placementtype.C: `PlacementType` is a property of the `AWS::EMR::Cluster` resource. `PlacementType` determines the Amazon EC2 Availability Zone configuration of the cluster (job flow).

elasticmapreduce.cluster.placementtype.A.Description: The Amazon EC2 Availability Zone for the cluster. `AvailabilityZone` is used for uniform instance groups, while `AvailabilityZones` (plural) is used for instance fleets.
